source_name: ACCC petrol price breakdown - gross indicative retail difference
notes: ACCC Report on the Australian petroleum market, December quarter 2025, Key messages/Figure 1.2. Gross indicative retail difference reported as 17.9 cpl; converted to A$/L. This is a broad indicator of retail costs and margins, not pure profit.
